sections.paragraph:
an unused root, which seems to have signified the same as נָרַג, Arab. quadril. زَيْرَجَ, as far as may be gathered from the derivatives.

(1) to roll rapidly; whence מֹורַג a threshing wain, (unless perhaps מרג in this noun is i.q. מָרַח, מָרַק to rub, to rub in pieces).

(2) to speak rapidly, used of babblers, tale-bearers; whence زَيْرَجُ, נִרְגָּן tale-bearer.
